creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
- Update to 0.6.2

This release is ABI compatible with the current 0.5.1 so no dependent ports need to be bumped. It includes a fix I sent upstream to make the port fully MAKE_JOBS_SAFE (it was previously randomly failing because the tests target did not depend on the library one).

Port maintainer (nivit@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_11 (mode: update, diff: ports)
